title: Future Outlook Exercises

exercises.title: Hardware Projection Model
hints: Iterate years until both targets met

exercises.title: PQC Migration Planner

testCases.input:
rb = RoadmapBuilder()
rb.add_initiative(Initiative('A', Priority.IMMEDIATE, 1.0, []))

exercises.title: Trend Impact Analyzer
hints: Filter high impact, high confidence, near-term

exercises.title: Quantum Advantage Estimator
hints: Project each metric with growth/improvement factors
Return -1 if not achieved in 30 years

testCases.input:
cap = HardwareCapability(100, 0.01, 100)
est = AdvantageEstimator(cap)
future = est.project_capability(1)
future.qubits == 140
